meaning: n.狗窝,狗屋,阴沟vt.置于狗窝,宿于狗舍vi.进狗窝
examples: Once you have chosen a kennel, make a booking for your pet.
Of course her kennel was in the nursery.
Holly Lee from the Kennel Club said electric collars delivered a painful shock to dogs.
Next came kennel maintenance and the dismal task of checking dogs' stools to assess their health.
